nodes.title: Music theme transitions
nodes.description: Given MusicManager.PlayTheme(themeId), when audio is not suppressed, then crossfade runs; when SuppressAudioOutputForTests is true, OnMusicThemeChangeRequested fires and ActiveThemeId updates without playback.

nodes.title: SFX sync with strike
nodes.description: Given a deferred melee hit, when OnAnimationHit fires, then strike SFX plays at impact (contract for future AudioDirector).
